overview: Frost Skeleton Halberdier is a Normal-class Undead monster found in Ice Abyss, Ice Cavern. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 50 HP, 19 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 3 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Combo at 160% ratio (304 base damage). Sight range 900, combat radius 140.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Fire, Divine, Earth
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-2500), Divine (-2000), Earth (-3000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 900 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 900 units, loses target at 1600 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 140, ability check distance 260
strategies.description: Combat area radius 140. Ability check distance 260. Ability attack delay: 0.6s.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 900 units. Loses target at 1600 units.
